user.title: Balcony Battery Manager – Input measurements
user.description: Select the sensors of your existing roof PV / main-battery system. These are read only; the balcony battery is never measured via the same central meter.

control.title: Balcony Battery Manager – Anker control entities
control.description: Map the Anker Solix entities used to steer the balcony battery. Only standard HA services are used, so the plugin stays robust against Anker integration version changes.

data.mode_manual_value: Option value that means manual/custom mode
data.discharge_number: Number entity: discharge / home-load output preset (W)
data.ac_charge_number: Number entity: AC charge power / limit (W)
data.deactivation_behavior: Behaviour when the plugin is disabled
data.deactivation_mode_value: Mode value to restore (only for 'restore Anker mode', e.g. Smart/Auto)

params.title: Balcony Battery Manager – Limits & parameters
params.description: An interval below 300 s is not useful: the Solarbank refreshes its cloud values only every ~5 minutes and more commands just create cloud load.

data.failsafe_after: Fail-safe after data outage (seconds, 0 = hold forever)
data.grid_support_enabled: Cover grid import when main battery is empty

data.mode_manual_value: Option value that means manual/custom mode
data.discharge_number: Number entity: discharge / home-load output preset (W)
data.ac_charge_number: Number entity: AC charge power / limit (W)
data.deactivation_behavior: Behaviour when the plugin is disabled

data.failsafe_after: Fail-safe after data outage (seconds, 0 = hold forever)
data.grid_support_enabled: Cover grid import when main battery is empty

enable.name: Enable
enable.description: Activate the balcony battery control loop.

disable.name: Disable
disable.description: Deactivate the control loop and run the configured deactivation action.

recalculate_now.name: Recalculate now
recalculate_now.description: Trigger an immediate evaluation outside the control interval.
